Create a simple population of artificial agents

Source: R/create_agents.R
create_agents.Rd

Creates a data frame of agents with positions, energy, speed, efficiency, and reproduction threshold.

Usage

create_agents(
  n_agents = 50,
  world_size = 1,
  energy_mean = 1,
  energy_sd = 0.15,
  trait_sd = 0.1,
  seed = NULL
)

Arguments

n_agents

Number of agents.

world_size

Size of the square world. Positions range from 0 to world_size.

energy_mean

Mean initial energy.

energy_sd

Standard deviation of initial energy.

trait_sd

Standard deviation used for speed and efficiency traits.

seed

Optional random seed.

Value

A data frame with one row per agent.
